sentences.text: Thank you for calling C W S Capital Partners. If you know your party's extension you may dial it at any time for a dial by name company directory press one to leave a message and the company voice mailbox.

Please spell the name of the person first name first press seven for Q and nine for Z to cancel the current operation press one for Deborah Buck to cancel please. Hold while I transfer your call. Good afternoon. This is Deborah Buck and I'm sorry, I'm unable to take your call right now, but if you will please leave me a name number and any message I'll be happy to get back to you as soon as possible. Thank you and have a great day. Please leave a message at the tone when finished you may hang up or press pound for additional options.

Hi, Debra. Good afternoon. This is Dana with rentable on the account executive here in Austin. I was hoping to reach you or the individual that handles the marketing ad C W S again, my name is Deidre with the rentable. I was trying to contact the right individual within your organization. I was hoping you could help me my call back number is nine five six four seven two four two eight zero Dieter with rentable nine five six four seven two four two eight zero. Thank you Deborah.

conversation.title: Call: Dither  Castro  and Debra Buck @ CWS Apartment Homes
